evernight.book.weapons.5:
§5§lSword
     §9§lOverview
§8===================
 §7Sword is a defensive weapon. It has the lowest DPS of all melee weapons but has high defense value. Sword abilities mostly supports the user and the allies.
evernight.book.weapons.7:
§4§lAxe
     §9§lOverview
§8===================
 §7Axe is a highly offensive weapon. It can deal large amount of damage but has slow weapon recharge and movement speed. Axe abilities often adds more power to its user.
evernight.book.weapons.9:
§2§lMace
     §9§lOverview
§8===================
 §7Mace has decent attack power and buffs. Its abilities can inflict various negative status effects, which can help weaken opponents' power.
evernight.book.weapons.11:
§3§lScythe
     §9§lOverview
§8===================
 §7Scythe grants its user high movement speed and attack speed in exchange of health and defense. Scythe's abilities can sometimes get out of dangerous situations.
evernight.book.weapons.13:
§c§lBow
     §9§lOverview
§8===================
 §7There are 3 avaliable bow types:
• Basher Bow can deal extra knockback;
• Sniper Bow gives stronger arrow damage;
• Flaming Bow can inflict fire to enemies.

§8===================
 §7Instead of using lapis, this world uses §6runic scrolls§7, which can be bought from the §bLibrarian§7. Simply drop the item you want to enchant and the runic scroll on the enchanting table and it'll do the thing.

§7• §5Enchant #2§7: §d40%
§7• §5Enchant #3§7: §d20%

evernight.waystone.no_waypoint: You do not have any registered waystone. :(
evernight.waystone.teleport.fail.boss_ar: You cannot use it inside boss battles!
evernight.waystone.teleport.fail.cutscen: You cannot use it while reading dialogues or inside cutscenes!
evernight.dialogue.prologue.portal.7: With a portal made of light
evernight.dialogue.prologue.portal.9: But where does it lead to?
evernight.dialogue.prologue.vendor.2: I found you in the forest near the village.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.vendor.3: But who are you... or what are you?
evernight.dialogue.prologue.vendor.4: A human you say? If I'm not wrong, aren't you supposed to be in the Overworld realm?
evernight.dialogue.prologue.vendor.5: You went through a portal? But I thought the legends said the portal in the other realm has been long lost.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.vendor.6: Well, if you want to return to your world, you'll need to find the portal in this realm. But I have no idea where it is.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.vendor.7: Perhaps you should try asking our chief. He might know a thing or two about the portal.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.1: Hello, human. I'm glad to see you awake.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.2: It's been a while since there are any human coming to this world.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.3: You want to return to where you were?
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.4: ...I'm sorry, but the portal is only activated using the power of natural sunlight, and the day has never come since a long time ago.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.5: This place is called the Evernight Realm. The world where the sun never comes out.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.6: Ever since the event happened years ago, this place has been in total darkness at all times.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.7: The cycle of day and night in this world is controlled by a powerful gem hidden deep under this realm, and it has broken into 7 small gem pieces that spread across the world.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.8: Because of it, the cycle has stopped. We have been living with the night all these years.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.9: Recently, our habitat is starting to decay due to a lack of sunlight. More and more monsters are starting to thrive outside the Village. We, Villagers, cannot deal with the monsters alone. Let alone getting the gem pieces back.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.10: So, please! Help us retrieve the gems so this situation can finally be reverted. You can also go back to your original world after that.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.11: Very well. Here's a token from me. You can use this to trade with the Weapon Merchant for a weapon.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.11_alt: Finally. Here's a token from me. You can use this to trade with the Weapon Merchant for a weapon.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.12: Here're also some money for you to buy some armour to protect yourself.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.13: You should also talk to each of our merchants to see what they sell. Come back to me when you're done.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.14: Looks like you have met most of our villagers.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.15: They should be able to help you with battles in the future.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.16: You can earn money by killing monsters just outside our village if you're wondering.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.17: You can exchange your money into other forms by trading with me as well.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.18: Before you start retrieving the gem pieces, it's better for you to have better gear than the ones you can buy from the traders.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.19: I advise you to earn some money, and upgrade your gear in the Blacksmith south of the village.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.20: Lastly, here is a Warpstone. You can use it to teleport to any waystone you have registered. There's a waystone just near the east exit of the village. You should go check it out.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.21: Come back when you're ready. Good luck!
evernight.dialogue.prologue.chief.refuse: Why would you refuse? This is your only way to go back! Please, help us!
Please, I beg you! This is my- our only chance to restore peace to this world!
...Dude, are you serious? Do you not care about leaving? Help us, and both of us can get what we wanted.
...Okay then, stubborn guy. Get out of our village and never come back again.
You have been kicked out of the village.
Without the aid from the village, you are now stuck in this realm, hunted by countless monsters.
Re-download the map to re-evaluate your choice.
evernight.dialogue.prologue.leave_villag: You are not allowed to leave the village yet!
You can now leave the village.
evernight.dialogue.village_chief.greetin: Hello, human. What do you want to know?
evernight.dialogue.village_chief.goodbye: Oh, okay then. Have a nice day.
evernight.dialogue.village_chief.leave: Your discussion with the chief has ended.
evernight.dialogue.village_chief.main_qu: There are 7 gems spread across the realm. Which one would you like to know better?
It would be better for you to focus on one gem piece at a time. What else do you want to know?
So, are you going to investigate this situation?
Alright then. Inform me when you decided to investigate into it later on. What do you want to know next?
Topaz is the Gem of Life. It has the ability to store light energy in itself.
Such kind of energy is then transformed which allows the revival of the dead.
The energy is also used to balance out the darkness provided by the other piece, Black Opal, which creates the day-night cycle of this realm.
Recently, the miners have discovered a hidden cave while mining in Cavern Relics. I took a peek inside, and found some sort of light sources floating around.
I believe that is where the Gem of Life can be found.
Let me know if you wish to investigate the hidden cave.
Alright. You can enter the Cavern Relics by walking into the miner cave southeast of the Village and head deeper into it.
Tell the miner that guards the cavern entrance and he will let you in.
Black Opal is the Gem of Darkness. It controls dark energy and is part of the creation of the day-night cycle along with Topaz.
The gem alone will spread darkness all around itself, which can cause the area around it into pitch black.
I suspect the gem piece has fallen into the Illager's hands. They are greedy people and may be holding the gem piece as a treasure.
The Dark Forest, which they inhabit in, is becoming darker and darker to the point where no one can enter the forest with that much darkness.
Dark Forest is on the east side of the Village. Be careful navigating through the forest. Not only it is dark inside, but there are also dangerous mobs which could kill you very easily.
You can first find the mansion the Illagers live in. It is on the edge of the forest.
Ruby is the Gem of Warmth. It has the ability to control fire and produce heat.
This gem is important in controlling the temperature of this world alongside Larimar.
Such power is highly noticeable that monsters around the gem will be influenced by fire in some sort.
We discovered that some monsters in Dread Swampland, which is northeast of the Village, are powered by fire energy.
It could be something in the swamp that is controlling the Gem of Warmth, but most of us are not brave enough to even enter the swamp.
Since we have you for the gem hunt now, I will leave this quest to you when you are ready.
Nice. Again, Dread Swampland is northeast of the Village.
Be careful not to touch any water inside the swamp though, those are very dirty and can drain your strength very quickly.
Pearl is the Gem of Storm. It brings various climates into this world, including rain and thunderstorms.
It is such an important gem for our crops since it provides clean water to the realm. Now that it is gone, we lost one of our main sources of water, which is troublesome.
We do not seem to find the place where it is fallen into either. The gems cannot be detected if it is not controlled by anything.
Now the priests claimed they discovered a new way to call back the weather cycle. I personally do not believe it, but for the sake of their lives, it would be great if you can "aid" them in some way.
Thanks for taking care of it. The priests have headed into the Mega Taiga, which is southwest of the Village.
Just try to help them and escort them back safely. We do not want any of our citizens going into dangerous areas.
Emerald is the Gem of Nature. It allows plants in this realm to thrive.
However, the gem will become unstable if operated alone and will corrupt the land around it.
I'm certain that the gem was hidden somewhere on the petrified land west of this Village. That is the only place of this realm where no plants exist.
The Pillager race that lives on the land may know a thing or two about the gem. If you wish to investigate, you should ask them about it.
Warning: This quest requires a bow to complete. Are you sure you want to continue?
Petrified Land is located west of the Village. Be careful navigating around the area though, the place is full of parasites that are quite difficult to tackle.
Also, try not to provoke the Pillagers in the area. We do not want them to raid our poor Village and get our resources stolen.
Divine Diamond as the Gem of Reincarnation. It has the ability to capture the souls of the dead.
Until now, the location of where the gem would be is unknown. Not even I have a clue on where it would possibly be.
Someone said it may be inside Spirit Forest, as the place is the home of spirits, a form of soul. I find that unlikely.
Speaking of Spirit Forest, there is a villager near that forest calling for help just a few moments ago. If you can help him out, I would be so much appreciated it.
Thanks a bunch. The villager is at the south exit of the miner cave southeast of the Village.
If you have to go inside Spirit Forest, do NOT step into the abyss. That is basically death for you.
I am sorry, but this one is rather tricky to do right now. I suggest you to take care of all other gem pieces first before this one.
Larimar is the gem of Frost. It has the ability to control water and produce chill.
This gem is important in controlling the temperature of this world alongside with Ruby.
The reason why I'm leaving this one for last is because it's very far away compared to the other ones.
Our fisherman and captain of the ship stated that they saw a huge amount of unusual brinicles and lands of ice forming somewhere at the ocean.
We believe that's where the last gem is located. So I'll leave this quest to you when you're ready.
Alright, our ship is at north of the village. Find the captain and he will bring you there.
evernight.dialogue.village_chief.side_qu: These areas aren't that important, but if you want details about them, feel free to ask me.
Would you like to do this mission?
Alright then. Inform me when you decided to do it later on. What do you want to know next?
Cold Taiga is located west of Mega Taiga.
There is the fountain in the middle of the area that keeps the place clean.
We had to keep the fountain from freezing to maintain its functionality, but we stopped doing that some time ago.
Because of that, the fountain is now frozen and the withers that were hidden under the area came out and took over Cold Taiga.
We might have trouble in a few years with them if we don't deal with them before they overpopulate.
We'll be much appreciated if you could enter and deal with the withers and melt the fountain again.
Alright then. Again, cold taiga is located west of Mega Taiga. There should be an icy wall blocking the entrance of it.
Use the Ruby to melt the entrance to gain access to Cold Taiga. Use it again to melt the frozen fountain too.

evernight.dialogue.skip_deny: [You are not allowed to skip this part of the dialogue]
evernight.dialogue.topaz.pre_quest.1: Hey! You are not allowed to enter this cave without the Chief's permission!
evernight.dialogue.topaz.part1.block: You should probably listen to what the miner says first.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.1: Where do you think you're going?
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.2: That place is too dangerous, can't you read?
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.3: We discovered this buried ancient civilization when we were working in this mine a long time ago.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.4: Just when we're about to investigate it, we found out that there's full of monsters.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.5: So we decided to block this entrance to ensure our village's safety.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.6: However, I've been hearing some strange noises and some weak beam of lights coming from the distance.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.7: I'm not sure what it is, but I think I've read about it before.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.8: If I'm not wrong, those are called Light Echoes, they're the memories of the royal knights of this ancient civilization before.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.9: Legend says that their memories became a form of light after their death, wandering around with no purpose until they're washed off by the time.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.10: Sounds interesting huh? I kinda want to see it but I ain't risking my life for that.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.11: What? The chief told you to investigate for us?
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.12: Well then, go see what's happening down there for us, if you need anything I'll just be here.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.14: Maybe the miner has some explosives to blow this up...
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.15: Oh, you're back, how was it?
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.16: You need explosives? Well, you will have to buy it from me then.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.17: Explosives' materials aren't easy to get lately.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.18: Well, good luck down there. Remember not to blow yourself up.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.19: This must be it, but where will the gem be...
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.21: You must be here for the gem, just like the others.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.22: We, the Royal Knights, were given this gem hundreds of years ago.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.23: However, its power is so strong that all of us want to make it our own. So we ended up fighting and killing each other. I'm the last survivor.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.24: Its power keeps me alive by absorbing the light of those memories, making me pretty much immortal.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.25: In exchange for this immortality, my job is to protect this gem for my master.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.26: Don't even bother trying to enter the catacombs, only the royal knights' swords are able to unlock this place.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.27: Now, return to where you came from before I kill you.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.29: You have just awakened the guardian of this catacomb.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.32: Time to be eliminated by the guardian once again.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.main.34: Well then, I'll take you down myself.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.post_quest.1: Welcome back, human. How's the investigation?
evernight.dialogue.topaz.post_quest.2: It seems you've retrieved the Gem of Life. Great job.
evernight.dialogue.topaz.post_quest.3: You may start retrieving other gems now. Just inform me when you're ready.
evernight.dialogue.opal.pre_quest.1: This place looks strangely dark and seem dangerous. It is better to receive some information from the chief first before exploring.
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.1: So this is the Dark Mansion according to the mayor. How do I get in?
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.2: Who dares to enter the Mansion of Illagers?
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.3: A human? I have no business to do with a newcomer.
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.4: I don't know why you come here, but outcomers are not allowed to enter...
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.5: Unless you become an eternal worker of course.
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.6: You don't seem to be asking for a job or having a business meeting with us. Why would a person that wears bulky gear and wields a weapon like earning money?
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.7: Go back to your lovely small village and don't even think about entering the mansion before regretting your life choices!
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.8: It seems like bargaining with the owner won't work. Maybe there is another way to open the door...
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.8_alt: It seems like bargaining with the owner won't work. Time to unlock the door with the key!
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.9: Refuse to accept my advice? Then time to be obliterated by my army of soldiers!
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.10: In the meantime, I'll be watching over here at the ballroom while you struggle to be alive for my entertainment.
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.11: Don't even attempt to break into the ballroom, the magical seal in front of the door will mostly wipe you out in an instant.
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.12: Unless the sources powering it are broken, there's no way you could break them. They all have projectile protection!
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.13: If you excuse me, I'll head over to my "playroom" and watch this show through the end of it. Good luck dying!
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.14: Oh. My. GOD! You guys SUCK at defeating some simple animal! No wonder I have absolutely NO faith in you insects!
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.15: Alright, you know what, come to the ballroom. If my soldiers can't defeat you, I will!
evernight.dialogue.opal.main.16: With my newfound power of darkness, your mere weapons are just a bunch of ants biting for me!
evernight.dialogue.opal.post_quest.1: It's nice that you've retrieved the Opal gem. Looks like the darkness didn't stop you at all.
evernight.dialogue.opal.post_quest.2: While you're here, please do me a favour and check out the black stall on the right when you leave this house.
evernight.dialogue.opal.post_quest.3: I've heard about a shady person doing something in that place.
evernight.dialogue.opal.post_quest.4: Moving that aside, inform me when you would like to start retrieving other gems.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.pre_quest.1: Hey, Mr. Human! I'm on my way to gather materials for my shop.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.pre_quest.2: It is better for you to not step inside the swamp. That is a quite dangerous place for the unprepared.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.pre_quest.3: Now, go somewhere else to explore, but do not come close here, okay? Bye!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.pre_quest.4: This place is dangerous according to a nearby villager. Better not go inside yet.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.pre_quest.4_alt: This place is dangerous according to a villager. Better not go inside yet.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.1: Huh, did not expect to see a human here.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.3: You want the gem? No way I will give that important gem!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.4: ...Actually, this is a great opportunity for you to help me with some stuff.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.5: How about this, find me something I need, then I might consider giving you the gem, fair?
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.6: Splendid! Now, go find me a specific kind of fish. The kind of fish that has a green and grey strip in them.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.7: They spawn just inside this swamp. The large pools on the upper ground spawn that. Search for it.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.8: Each pool only §4spawn a certain species §rin them. Find the one that spawns the fish I need, and grab one of them. Now go!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.wrong_fish.block: I mean, the opposite colour of purple is green...
evernight.dialogue.ruby.wrong_fish.queen: Well, this one does have green colour in it, but it doesn't have strips! Go find another one!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.wrong_fish.kob: I bet you only think "green" is the only description I've given. Guess what, you're wrong!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.wrong_fish.parro: Eh, I'm sure "strip" is the only thing you've heard.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.wrong_fish.threa: ...Wrong fish, did you even listen to my instructions?
evernight.dialogue.ruby.wrong_fish.puffe: ...You got this just to see my reaction,  don't you? Guess what,  you're not getting anything from me!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.9: So do you have that fish yet?
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.10: Great! I totally did not expect that you can survive the swamp water, that gooey stuff are just too hard to touch.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.11: You want the gem now? Who told you that you just need to help for one thing?
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.12: Help me to get some bottles of Shallowbreath, then we can talk!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.13: What is a Shallowbreath you ask? They spawn randomly throughout the swamp with dirty green gaseous stuff.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.14: Just throw an empty bottle at it and it will fill the bottle up with that gas.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.15: They are vigorous when touching fire though, do NOT set them on fire since you will be wasting precious resources!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.16: Ok now go get the gas for me!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.18: Huh, looks like you're more courageous than what I thought.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.19: Those things are just too gross to even smell them. I almost vomited the last time I tried to collect some...
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.20: Anyways, I need one more item before you can have that bargain.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.21: Somewhere under this swamp, there's a Spider Nest which is home to vicious spiders, of course.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.22: I need you to kill the queen of the spiders and take her eye, that's it.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.23: Provided that you can obtain the previous items that quickly, killing a spider queen should be no problem.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.24: Unless! She is so quick at producing baby spiders so be wary of that.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.25: You will need this to access the nest the spider queen lives in. Good luck defending it.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.26: So, have you got the eye?
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.27: Nice! Those spider swarms didn't beat you up huh.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.28: Well, good job fetching all the resources I need.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.29: Now if you excuse me while I brew this thing up...
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.30: Oh, the gem? That's useless for you now...
evernight.dialogue.ruby.main.31: Because I'm going to kill you with my greatest creation yet!
evernight.dialogue.ruby.post_quest.1: Welcome back from the swamp. Good job navigating that grimy area.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.post_quest.2: You also retrieved the Ruby gem too. I expect nothing less from you.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.post_quest.3: I guess you have also dealt with the witch there. She better learn her lesson for lying and stealing the gem from us.
evernight.dialogue.ruby.post_quest.4: Anyways, come to me when you're ready for the next gem retrieval mission.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.pre_quest.1: A statue? it's probably better to get more information about this place from the chief before exploring.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.part1.block: Maybe you should talk to the Head Priest first before moving forward...
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.1: Hey new resident! How are you doing today?
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.2: We are the Villager Priest Group of this realm. We are on our way to start our worshipping towards our almighty rain god.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.3: But this is actually our first time worshipping such god since we have abandoned it for a long time until the recent incident.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.4: Yes, we might have angered the rain god and the weather system might have been halted by it until this day...
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.5: It is known to be the God of Weather of this realm and we haven't been worshipping it for quite a long time now.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.6: Now that the cycle is long gone, we have been trying to summon it and communicate with it to bring back the cycle, although it might not be as easy as on paper.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.7: Thanks to our chief, we now have a way of summoning this forgotten god.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.8: Unfortunately, we cannot enter these caves, where one of the crucial sacrifices holds, due to a large number of monsters lurking inside.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.9: I guess the chief sent you out here to lend us some help. So may you please head inside and clear the monsters for us so we can pass through?
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.10: We will be waiting in this tent until you have done the cleaning.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.11: Thanks for helping us to clear the way in. Time to activate this Tempest Block.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.12: There should be an adjusting tool right around this area, but it seems that is not the case...
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.13: Hey, mind if you help us search for it? We cannot finish the job without it.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.15: Now, forgive me but can I ask you to activate these blocks and give them to me?
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.16: You see, we villagers are so weak and our group can barely reach this place.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.17: We simply cannot go any further without some sort of guard.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.18: So we will be so appreciated it if you can help us with this task.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.19: Let me give you this instruction paper to you and I will be heading back to the camp.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.20: We will be waiting for you in here with the Tempest Blocks so we can decide the next move.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.21: Oh, I can see that you have brought to us just enough Tempest Blocks!
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.22: I know it sounds troublesome but please guide us to the Storm Shrine?
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.23: It is located southmost of Mega Taiga and that is the place where we summon the rain god.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.24: We will be following you on the way so please be careful on the way.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.25: So this is the Storm Shrine...
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.26: Time to summon the god, are you guys ready?
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.28: Oh, your highness, please aid us with your power to help restore the weather cycle of this world!
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.30: Oh no! It is angry! Ruuun!
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.31: It must be because we've abandoned him in the past!
evernight.dialogue.pearl.main.32: Human! Please calm our god and let us atone our sins!
evernight.dialogue.pearl.post_quest.1: I've heard from the priests. I'm surprised there's a giant creature in that palace.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.post_quest.2: ...You killed it and received the Pearl? That's double the surprise.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.post_quest.3: Good job getting such an important gem, human.
evernight.dialogue.pearl.post_quest.4: Feel free to take a rest, or continue to retrieve the rest of the gems. Just tell me when you're ready.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.pre_quest.1: This place doesn't look nice to travel in. Better avoid this area unless it's necessary.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.stronghold.bl: Hey! You are not allowed in!
evernight.dialogue.emerald.dungeon.block: You're not allowed in! This place is too dangerous!
evernight.dialogue.emerald.top_floor.blo: You cannot go inside without permission!
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.1: Stop right there, state your purpose!
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.3: Our scientist will be glad to see you.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.4: Wait! You're just gonna let them in? Just like that?
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.5: They don't seem like those disgusting villagers though.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.9: So you come to help us.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.10: Well then, let me explain everything to you.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.11: Years ago, the sky suddenly turned dark, and our land become petrified for unknown reason.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.12: And then one day, we discovered a green gem buried under our stronghold while we're still building our underground base.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.13: So we decided to bring it back and do some research on it.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.14: It turned out that the gem was the source of the unknown force that completely drained our land.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.15: Due to an unlimited amount of rocks, silverfish swarms were also attracted outside and under our stronghold and caused the unusual reproduction speed of theirs.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.16: We've been trying to revive our land by extracting the essence out of the gem and inject it on the ground as you can see beside me.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.17: But it isn't that effective as I expected it to be. I believe it's because that the silverfishes are in the way.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.18: Someone also reported to me that there are some weird-looking purple eggs started to infest our underground base as well.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.19: I'm worried that those silverfish might've already start to mutate.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.20: Since you said you're here to help, I'll need you to search for those eggs and the source of them in the underground base and kill it.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.21: Come back to me when you're done.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.22: Knowing that they have other problems, you decided to take that as priority.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.23: That should be all of them. Now I just need to search for the source.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.25: Hmm, but the gem doesn't seem to do any better.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.26: You explained to the scientist about your true intention.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.27: So that's the real reason why you came here.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.28: I'm sorry, but I'm not the one in charge here. The gem is at the top floor, which is where our leader is. You should try telling him about this.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.29: So you're the helper that my scientist told me about.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.30: But what you did doesn't seem to change our current situation.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.31: You explained to the leader that the only way to truly revive their land is to bring all the gems together.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.32: Ha, don't even think of taking the gem with you, finders keepers.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.33: And that doesn't matter anymore. I guess I'm just gonna raid the village instead. That's much easier for me.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.34: The leader's action leaves you no choice.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.35: Oh? Are you gonna challenge me?
evernight.dialogue.emerald.main.36: Well then, let's see what you got.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.post_quest.1: Great job retrieving the Emerald from the Pillagers. I hope you didn't get much trouble from them.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.post_quest.2: ...What? You killed their leader? That's somewhat concerning.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.post_quest.3: I guess it's for the greater good if that's the only way to get the gem back.
evernight.dialogue.emerald.post_quest.4: Anyways, what else do you need?
evernight.dialogue.diamond.pre_quest.2: Please do not trespass the horrific Spirit Forest.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.pre_quest.3: Rumour says that if you dare to enter such place, your soul will be taken out and will never be able to come back. This is for your own good.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.pre_quest.4: It is better not to go past this tunnel when there is a guard here.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.abyss.block: You should rescue the children souls first before proceeding.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.1: There you are! You must be the new resident that the chief told me about.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.2: As you may know already, my children's souls were lost in the spirit forest, which is the evil-looking forest behind those bamboos.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.3: They wanted to play with the pandas so badly that they didn't realize how close they were to that forbidden place.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.4: And the moment I got there, it was too late. I couldn't do anything but watch their souls being dragged by the roots.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.5: Now they've become mindless like some empty containers.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.6: Anyway, the chief must have sent you here to help me to rescue the children.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.7: Here, these are some special bottles which can capture the lost souls given by the priest.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.8: And before you go, you need to know that the logs of that forest are too hard to break with anything accessible in this village.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.9: But I heard that there's a special item in there that is powerful enough to break the roots.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.10: Therefore, you'll need to find the item first before you can break into the roots and rescue them.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.11: That's all I've got to say. Please be careful and good luck!
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.12: You hear someone talking from the Abyss...
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.13: Oh? Is someone attempting to craft the torch to interrupt my plan?
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.14: Pathetic. Guards, go check it out.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.15: This must be it. Now I just need to find where the children souls are.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.16: It seems like the fire from this torch's ability can burn tree roots (Resemble as fences).
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.17: Got them! Time to give them back to the Villager.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.19: And you got all the children's souls back as well, I can't thank you enough!
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.20: Anyway, we need to do something about that forest. I believe you've also heard a mysterious voice inside.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.21: There must be some kind of leader that is doing all of this.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.22: You must find the source of the voice and stop it to prevent more innocents' souls from being stolen.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.23: I see. So you must be the one that ruined my plan.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.24: This is Great. Now you brought yourself to me, it's so much easier for me to destroy you.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.25: Oh, you asked why I only choose children's souls?
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.26: That's because their young souls can provide much more life energy for me to consume.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.27: Those adults' souls are pretty much useless, so I either destroyed them or forced them to become my guards.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.28: There's no escape now. If you attempt to run away, the abyss will turn you into one of my spirit slaves.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.main.29: It's time for you to die!
evernight.dialogue.diamond.post_quest.2: It's nice to hear that his problem has been solved.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.post_quest.3: Anyways, have you met anything vicious inside the forest?
evernight.dialogue.diamond.post_quest.4: As you tried to inform the chief about the Spirit Tree, you hear a sound that tells you not to let the chief know anything about it.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.post_quest.5: Oh. I'm just afraid you'll die there. You're our only hope to fix this world after all.
evernight.dialogue.diamond.post_quest.6: Anyways... what else do you need?
evernight.dialogue.larimar.pre_quest.2: I'm sorry, but it's impossible to sail outwards.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.pre_quest.3: We have a rather concerning issue regarding the ocean.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.pre_quest.4: Please go somewhere else to explore.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.1: Oh, you must be the newcomer that everyone is talking about.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.1_alt: Oh, so you are the newcomer that everyone is talking about.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.2: I hope you can resolve whatever is happening in the ocean.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.4: So I guess you are now ready to go... I can try to bring you there but I make no promises.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.6: I know this doesn't look like the place you wanted to go, but this is as far as I can bring you.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.7: The water and air of that area is lethally cold, so I'll leave the rest to a little friend of mine.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.8: This dolphin is imbued with a spell from the priests, stay beside him and he'll keep you warm and grant you the ability to breathe underwater.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.9: I'll have him bring you to the gem's possible location. All you need to do is simply follow him.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.10: But as I said, the brinicles area is extremely cold, if you swim too far from the dolphin, you'll probably freeze to death instantly, so be careful.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.11: That's all from me. Whatever is in the middle of that place, good luck.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.12: This must be it. But how do I get inside?
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.13: Apparently this monument has a defense system.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.14: I see, so you're the one who's been collecting the gem pieces.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.15: And you seem to have already got the rest of them. Impressive.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.16: Then that means you may have met my master, the one who created this monument to protect the Gem of Frost.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.17: Hm, is that it? If you have trouble dealing with such powerful being, I do not see how are you going to save this realm.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.18: Whether you are worthy of this gem, I will see for myself.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.19: ...I guess you really are something, huh?
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.20: I am not sure who you are doing this for, but I think I have a rough idea.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.21: So even if you have conquered my master, I will still consider you as my enemy, and I will fulfill my duty to the bitter end.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.main.23: In any case, I will now consider you as a trespasser of this monument, and I shall take you out of existence.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.2: And you reclaimed Larimar as well, just as the chief expected.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.3: Oh, where's the chief, you asked?
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.4: He wanted me to stay here to tell you that he went to the mainland.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.5: Oh yeah, you're not from this dimension, so you don't know about the mainland.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.6: Basically the village we're in right now is located on a small island.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.7: And the chief is waiting for you in the Wisteria Village on the mainland.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.8: He believes that you'll survive like you always did, and retrieve Larimar.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.9: Therefore he's probably planning to meet you at the Wisteria Village and then take you to the gem altar, since it's also located on the mainland.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.10: Though I'm not sure if 6 gems will be enough since the chief said that no one knows where the Divine Diamond is.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.11: ...wait, you have the diamond? Does the chief know that already?
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.12: Hmm, that's weird. If you've never told him about it, why is he taking you there now?
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.13: Perhaps he's got other plans? I guess that's the question we will only know once you find him.
evernight.dialogue.larimar.post_quest.14: Anyway, the captain of the ship can take you to the mainland, good luck.
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.potion_mas: ...ugh, what's she trying to do now...
Wait, you're not the witch!
Hey! Please help me get out of here!
I've been caged in this prison for days now!
I'm starving, thirsty, suffering from her horrible experiments...
Anyways, I need a cage key to unlock this cage.
I'm pretty sure the witch is carrying the keys with her.
I have a great idea to lure her to take out the key...
Wait, you killed her? But she only has the prison gate key?
If that's the case, she might be putting her keys inside her little hut.
Please help me find it, then I can just unlock the cage myself.
Finally! Outta this garbage!
Hey, thanks for helping me out!
I'm the master brewer of the village race in this world.
While I was searching for ingredients in this swamp, I fell down the valley and get caught by the witch.
Then she locked me up in this cage and did various damaging experiments to me...
Like injecting me with poison, bloodletting me to near death before healing me, and most recently, using fire magic to burn me alive...
Let's not talk about that, shall we? Time for me to return to business!
Don't wait for me, I still need to find my backpack back before heading back to the village.
Feel free to buy some potions from me in the potion shop in the village. You'll find them handy in various situations.
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.cold_taiga: Something is approaching to the fountain...
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.figueroa.2: ...Please come inside the gem, we need to talk...
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.figueroa.4: There's an engraved text on the diamond gem which says: Release the gem's power to enter the realm within.
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.figueroa.5: So you're the one who tries to collect the gem pieces back.
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.figueroa.6: I highly advise you not to do that. You will create a giant trouble for doing so.
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.figueroa.7: If you insist, prove to me you are strong enough to overcome the upcoming challenges.
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.figueroa.8: Defeat me, and you shall know the truth.
evernight.dialogue.side_quest.figueroa.9: Let's just get to the point.
evernight.dialogue.epilogue.chapter_1.1: The vendor is asked to take the chief's place, so that someone could inform the adventurer of where he has gone.
evernight.dialogue.epilogue.chapter_1.2: After learning the chief's whereabout, the adventurer decided to head to the Wisteria Village located on the mainland.
evernight.dialogue.epilogue.chapter_1.3: Despite knowing the purpose of going to the mainland is to return the gems to the gem altar, the details remain unknown.
evernight.dialogue.epilogue.chapter_1.4: That's not the only mystery, however. Before the death of the witch, she seemed to know something we do not.
evernight.dialogue.epilogue.chapter_1.5: The intention of the chief going to the mainland to return the gems despite not knowing the diamond has been retrieved is still unclear as well.
evernight.dialogue.epilogue.chapter_1.6: After retrieving all the gems, lots of mysteries are still left to unfold.

evernight.message.tip.1: You can exchange your coins from the chief.
evernight.message.tip.2: Mob drops and chest loots gradually become better as you progresses.
evernight.message.tip.3: Treasure keys are required to open tier 2~3 loot chests.
evernight.message.tip.4: Hostile mobs are not able to enter the village.
evernight.message.tip.5: You get constant regeneration, resistance and saturation after staying in the village for 10 seconds.
evernight.message.tip.6: Seal effect prevents you or bosses from using abilities.
evernight.message.tip.7: Immunization effect clears and prevents you from getting any negative effects.
evernight.message.tip.8: Nullification effect clears and prevents you from getting any positive effects.
evernight.message.tip.9: Embrittlement effect will decrease your armor value.
evernight.message.tip.10: Blindness effect reduces affected mob's detection range by 85%.
evernight.message.tip.11: Mysterious book only drops from mobs when the map level is high enough, or sold by black market occasionally.
evernight.message.tip.12: If all players die, the boss fight resets.
evernight.message.tip.13: The order of the quests you choose affects how you'll progress.
evernight.message.tip.14: Read the books on the lecterns to know how the things work.
evernight.message.tip.15: Sometimes the black market sells chief token, which allows you to buy another melee weapon.
evernight.message.tip.16: The success rate of the experience crystals can be stacked, but they can't be used for enchanting mysterious book.
evernight.message.tip.17: If you want to enchant a higher level of the same enchantment, you need to disenchant the current one.
evernight.message.tip.18: You don't need experience crystals to increase upgrade's success rate.

evernight.boss.figueroa.title: Incarnation of Holiness
evernight.boss.figueroa.name: Figueroa
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.2: Looks like you are stronger than I thought.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.3: Since you have defeated me, you deserve to know the truth.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.4: I, Figueroa, was one of the guardians of this realm.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.5: Me, and the other guardian, named Apeiro, protect the Gem of Creation.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.6: Everything was peaceful until one day, Apeiro decided to steal the gem and attempted to possess its power.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.7: I knew possessing such power would bring disaster upon worlds, especially when Apeiro was a power-hungry person.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.8: I split the gem into 7 pieces, each with part of the power of the Gem of Creation, and decided to hide each of them in different areas.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.9: But before I got to hide all of them, I was defeated by Apeiro and banished into the diamond gem.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.10: After you retrieved the gem piece, I sensed the presence of Apeiro.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.11: Something is wrong with the Chief from the village. Maybe he is on to something.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.12: Be extra careful with him. I don't believe he is trustable.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.13: I will lend you my power for dealing with problems later on. Also, take these items before you leave. The contents inside may help you in the future.
evernight.boss.figueroa.death.14: I am counting on you on ending this situation. Goodbye, hero.

evernight.end_lobby.creator_notes.3: But I'm not sure what kind of drugs we were on, it just become the map you see right now.
evernight.end_lobby.creator_notes.4: Uhm, pretty sure it was only you.
evernight.end_lobby.creator_notes.5: Anyway, since this map is mainly made by 2 people, and the map is too big of a project for us, we decided to split the map into 2 parts.
evernight.end_lobby.creator_notes.6: Chapter 2 will be released along with possibly updated chapter 1.
evernight.end_lobby.creator_notes.7: 'Cause god knows what version will it be by then, we might as well update the old contents.
evernight.end_lobby.creator_notes.8: Again, hope you enjoyed the map and thanks for all the people from §3Keinett server §rand some other friends to be our testers.
evernight.end_lobby.creator_notes.9: I definitely didn't kidnap them. They volunteered.
evernight.end_lobby.creator_notes.10: Anyway, that's it from me. You can either leave now or take a look at the Gallery of Randomness.

evernight.end_lobby.gallery.scrapped_ide: This tower is the very first command creation EnzoSorensen created for the Ocean region. The tower rises up once a player approaches the area. Once activated, the tower starts charging up its laser to the player.
Since this creation was almost 4 years ago from the map's release, this is basically forgotten by both of us while designing and implementing the Ocean Monument.

The harder ice puzzle layouts for the central room inside the first floor of the Ocean Monument. The trick to solving these puzzles are by making use of the 16-block freeze / thaw limitation to stop the block changes at the looping points.
They eventually are scrapped or have reduced difficulty after almost all testers struggled to solve them.
The early version of Cavern Relics requires the players to collect 4 different colour essences to open the door for Crystal Cavern. Eventually this idea was scrapped and Cavern Relics was expanded.
Two of the essences are showcased here:
- Blue essence: Approaching the essence spawns a timed parkour with the collectible at the end;
- Pink essence: Approaching the essence spawns a miniboss "Spectre Archer" and drops the essence upon killing it.

The puzzle inside Crystal Cavern that was later scrapped for the overhaul of the Topaz quest. Originally there were 3 levels of the puzzle. Upon clearing all of them, opens the pathway to the Boss Gate.
evernight.end_lobby.gallery.showcase.1.d: A simple and fun to watch arrow auto-aim system was created while testing the functionality where an entity moves towards a player with controllable speed. This function is used on custom projectiles such as Dazzling Ray's arrows and the turret guard's ice bullets.
evernight.end_lobby.gallery.showcase.2.d: Defeating each main quest boss increases the overall map level. Map level contributes to the mob's max health and attack damage. Some of them have their equipment changed for different level ranges.
Mid-development, a new value "Mutation" was added. On normal difficulty or higher, Spawned mobs may have a chance to be "mutated" and have their levels raised by 2.
Sidequest mobs are made as a "Strong" mob and also have their levels raised by 2. "Mutated" and "Strong" mobs both drop better loot and more experience points. Both of these variants can be stacked.
